MASTER_OF_MANKIND-CHAOS_KHORNE_NEXT_0: Next: gain 8 Vigor at turn start; Wrath requires 1 Attack.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-CHAOS_KHORNE_NEXT_1: Next: gain 20 Vigor at turn start; Wrath requires 2 Attacks.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-CHAOS_KHORNE_NEXT_MAX: Maximum Khorne and Wrath level reached.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-CHAOS_TZEENTCH_NEXT_0: Next: draw and transform 1 chosen card; Deception forces up to 1 more.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-CHAOS_TZEENTCH_NEXT_1: Next: draw and transform up to 2 chosen cards; Deception forces up to 2 more.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-CHAOS_TZEENTCH_NEXT_MA: Maximum Tzeentch and Deception level reached.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-CHAOS_NURGLE_NEXT_0: Next: apply 1 Weak and Vulnerable to ALL enemies; lose 1 HP at turn end.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-CHAOS_NURGLE_NEXT_1: Next: also gain 9 Block; lose 2 HP at turn end.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-CHAOS_NURGLE_NEXT_MAX: Maximum Nurgle and Corruption level reached.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-CHAOS_SLAANESH_NEXT_0: Next: maximum Hand size becomes 15; Obsession affects 1 card.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-CHAOS_SLAANESH_NEXT_1: Next: also gain 1 Energy at turn start; Obsession affects 2 cards.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-CHAOS_SLAANESH_NEXT_MA: Maximum Slaanesh and Obsession level reached.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-DECREE_EXECUTION_PROMP: Select prepared Decrees in execution order. Confirm without selecting to wait.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-DECREE_IMMEDIATE_PROMP: Choose any number of Decrees to execute immediately.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-ARMOUR_RETAIN_PROMPT: Choose cards to Retain this turn.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-GOLDEN_THRONE_PROMPT: Choose the Golden Throne's decree for this turn.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-CHAOS_BOON_PROMPT: Choose a Chaos Boon. Boons already at level 2 are unavailable.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-TZEENTCH_CARD_PROMPT: Choose cards to transform for this turn. Confirm with none selected to skip.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-TZEENTCH_REPLACEMENT_P: Choose the Emperor card this card becomes for the turn.
